# Partner Livingku

> Direktori kost & apartemen terpercaya di Bali, Indonesia.
> Trusted co-living and apartment directory in Bali, Indonesia.

## About

Partner Livingku is a verified property directory specializing in co-living spaces,
apartments, and daily rentals across Bali, Indonesia. We connect property seekers
directly with verified owners — transparent pricing, real on-site photos, no hidden
fees, no fake listings, and instant contact via WhatsApp.

We also offer end-to-end property management services for owners across Bali.

## Coverage Areas (Bali)

Denpasar, Seminyak, Canggu, Ubud, Kuta, Sanur, Jimbaran, Nusa Dua, Legian,
Kerobokan, Gianyar, Tabanan, Singaraja, Uluwatu, Berawa, Pererenan

## Listing Categories

- **Kost Eksklusif** — Premium co-living rooms, monthly rental
- **Kost Putri** — Women-only co-living
- **Kost Pria** — Men-only co-living
- **Kost Campur** — Mixed co-living
- **Apartemen Studio** — Studio apartments
- **Apartemen 1BR / 2BR** — 1–2 bedroom apartments
- **Sewa Harian** — Daily/short-term rental (villas, rooms)

## Property Management Services for Owners

- Operational management: housekeeping, maintenance, vendor coordination
- Financial management: rent collection, monthly reports, expense tracking
- Listing & marketing: professional photography, branding, Instagram & TikTok ads
- Tenant management: lease agreements, check-in/check-out handling, customer service

## How It Works

1. Browse and filter listings on the homepage by area or housing type
2. Click "Detail" on any listing to view full description, photos, facilities, and price
3. Click "Chat WA" to contact the owner directly via WhatsApp — no middleman fees

## Key Features

- All listings are verified by the Partner Livingku team
- Transparent pricing — price shown is price paid, no hidden fees
- Real on-site photos — not stock images
- Direct WhatsApp contact with property owners
- Bilingual platform: Bahasa Indonesia and English
- Available Monday–Sunday, 08:00–21:00 WIB (UTC+7)

## Target Audience

- Individuals, couples, and families relocating to Bali
- Digital nomads and remote workers seeking monthly or daily rentals in Bali
- Students and young professionals looking for affordable co-living in Bali
- Expats looking for verified furnished apartments in Bali
- Property owners in Bali seeking professional management services

## Contact & Links

- Website: https://partnerlivingku.id
- Website (English): https://partnerlivingku.id/en
- Privacy Policy: https://partnerlivingku.id/privacy-policy
- Terms of Service: https://partnerlivingku.id/terms-of-service
- Sitemap: https://partnerlivingku.id/sitemap.xml
- Hours: Monday–Sunday, 08:00–21:00 WIB
